allow: Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "const {createClient}=require\('@supabase/supabase-js'\); const c=createClient\(process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY\); \(async\(\)=>{ const a=await c.from\('profiles'\).select\('*'\).limit\(2\); console.log\('all cols:',JSON.stringify\(a,null,2\)\); const b=await c.from\('profiles'\).select\('id,full_name,gender,job_title'\).limit\(1\); console.log\('new cols:',JSON.stringify\(b,null,2\)\); }\)\(\);")

Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "\(async\(\)=>{ const r=await fetch\(process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL+'/rest/v1/',{headers:{apikey:process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY,Authorization:'Bearer '+process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}}\); const j=await r.json\(\); const tables=Object.keys\(j.definitions||{}\); console.log\('tables in REST schema:',tables\); }\)\(\);")
